hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys, re
try:
    data = json.load(sys.stdin)
    cmd = data.get('command', '')
    if 'git commit' in cmd:
        msg_match = re.search(r'-m\s+[\"\']([^\"\']+)[\"\']', cmd)
        if msg_match:
            msg = msg_match.group(1)
            pattern = r'^(feat|fix|docs|style|refactor|test|chore|ci|perf|revert)(\([a-z][a-z0-9-]*\))?: .{1,72}$'
            if not re.match(pattern, msg):
                print(f'ERROR: Commit message does not follow Conventional Commits format.', file=sys.stderr)
                print(f'Expected: type(scope): description', file=sys.stderr)
                print(f'Got: {msg}', file=sys.stderr)
                sys.exit(1)
except Exception:
    pass
"

python3 -c "
import json, sys, os, re
try:
    data = json.load(sys.stdin)
    path = data.get('file_path', '')
    if re.search(r'webapp/src/(?!.*__tests__).*\.tsx?$', path):
        base = re.sub(r'webapp/src/', 'webapp/src/lib/__tests__/', path)
        base = re.sub(r'\.(tsx?)$', '.test.\\1', base)
        alt = re.sub(r'webapp/src/(.+?)\.(tsx?)$', r'webapp/src/lib/__tests__/\1.test.\2', path)
        if not os.path.exists(path.replace('/src/', '/src/lib/__tests__/').replace('.ts', '.test.ts').replace('.tsx', '.test.tsx')):
            dir_name = os.path.dirname(path)
            test_dir = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(path)), 'lib', '__tests__')
            base_name = os.path.basename(path)
            test_name = re.sub(r'\.(tsx?)$', r'.test.\1', base_name)
            test_path = os.path.join(test_dir, test_name)
            if 'lib/' in path and not os.path.exists(test_path):
                print(f'WARNING: No test file found for {os.path.basename(path)}.', file=sys.stderr)
                print(f'TDD required: create {test_path} first.', file=sys.stderr)
except Exception:
    pass
"

python3 -c "
import json, sys, os, subprocess, re
try:
    data = json.load(sys.stdin)
    path = data.get('file_path', '')
    if re.search(r'webapp/src/.*\.(tsx?|js)$', path):
        result = subprocess.run(
            ['npm', 'test', '--', '--run'],
            cwd=os.path.join(os.path.dirname(path).split('webapp')[0], 'webapp'),
            capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60
        )
        if result.returncode != 0:
            print('Tests failed after changes:', file=sys.stderr)
            print(result.stdout[-2000:], file=sys.stderr)
except Exception:
    pass
"
